title: RogueTundra's Building Tools
description: Includes building tools like Axiom and WorldEdit along with shaders and quality of life mods. Primarily meant for building vanilla compatible worlds in creative.
body:
This a smaller modpack designed to help with building quickly and efficiently. A primary goal is that it is just an aid in editting minecraft worlds and that the worlds could be loaded after in vanilla minecraft without any problems.

The primary two mods are WorldEdit and Axiom, which are both tools to edit minecraft worlds in game with quick selections, copying & pasting, rotations, replacements, drawing tools, shape tools, and more. Ordinarily, WorldEdit selections are invisible, so WorldEdit CUI has been installed to make the selections visible and prevent accidental errors.

Also included are quality of life mods such as Sodium: which gives optimized rendering and allows more control over video settings, Controlling: which adds searching and other features to the keybind menu, AppleSkin: which shows saturation and exhaustion in survival, Effect Timer Plus: which shows exactly how many seconds effects last for, and many more.

Included are shaders which are primarily lightweight, such as Mellow, Miniature Shader, and Complementary Shaders.
